strengths: Proven experience with full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in event-driven systems and microservices architecture
Demonstrated ability to scale engineering teams and develop technical leadership
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure and regulated environments
No clear indication of experience with agentic AI frameworks beyond contribution to AI-agent infrastructure
Limited visibility into experience with large-scale distributed systems and real-time inference

key_factors.factor: Experience in fintech or regulated environments

response.justification: The candidate has relevant technical expertise and experience in scaling engineering teams, but lacks direct experience in fintech infrastructure and regulated environments.
